'''旧暦3月29日'''は[[旧暦]][[3月 (旧暦)|3月]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[1163年]]_月_日） - 長寛に改元 * （[[1361年]]_月_日） - 北朝が康安に改元 * [[天和]]3年（[[1683年]]_月_日） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（[[1696年]]_月_日） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[嘉永]]6年（[[1853年]]_月_日） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（[[1401年]]_月_日） - [[称光天皇]]、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]）
== 忌日 == * （[[997年]]_月_日） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[3月28日 (旧暦)|3月28日]] 翌日[[3月30日 (旧暦)|3月30日]] - 前月[[2月29日 (旧暦)|2月29日]] 翌月[[4月29日 (旧暦)|4月29日]] *新暦[[3月29日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（[[997年]]_月_日） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月29日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月29日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]

== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * [[天保]]7年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]

== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月29日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）

{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月29日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）

{{Lunar March}} '''Lunar March29日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

'''March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 29'''<!--Lunar March29--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。

== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先勝]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

'''March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar March}} ''March 29'''<!--Lunar March29--> is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
== Events == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== Deaths == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

{{Lunar March}} '''March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
<!--== {{Lunar March}} ''March 29'''<!--Lunar March29 is the Nth day of [[3月 (旧暦)|Lunar March]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]][[Category:先勝]]である。
--> == Events == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== Deaths == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）

revision.comment: adding this info to all 29th days
Text replacement - "旧暦360日" to "Old Lunar Calendar360日"
Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
removing all the commented out stuff
Text replacement - "it is the second last day.{{citation needed}}" to "it is the second last day.{{citation needed|replace this with source on all articles}}"
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Moving from [[Category:先勝]] to [[Category:Senshō]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Text replacement - "{{citation needed|replace this with source on all articles}}" to "<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref>"
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion
switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

adding korean to all the dates

Text replacement - "[[グレゴリオ暦]]" to "[[Gregorian Calendar]]"
removing some junk and restandardizing the references section and template
revision.text:
[[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[長寛]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1163]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1683]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864]]）
== Deaths == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939]]）

[[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[長寛]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1163]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1683]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする

[[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[長寛]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1163]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16th year（ユリウス暦[[1361]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1683]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[応永]]8th year（ユリウス暦[[1401]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428]]） * 宝暦12nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1762]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836]]） * [[文政]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1828]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864]]）
== Deaths == * [[至道]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[997]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939]]）

[[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}}.
== Events == * [[長寛]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1163]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16th year（ユリウス暦[[1361]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3rd year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1683]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1696]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3rd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1853]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[応永]]8th year（ユリウス暦[[1401]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428]]） * 宝暦12nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1762]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836]]） * [[文政]]11th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1828]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864]]）
== Deaths == * [[至道]]3rd year（ユリウス暦[[997]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939]]）
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

[[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[5月4日]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[4月25日]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[4月30日]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]] 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[5月6日]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[5月12日]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[4月23日]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[5月12日]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[5月8日]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

[[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）

== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] to [[March 29 (Lunisolar)]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar" to "Lunisolar"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250qq1081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} qqth year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）

== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[正平 (日本)|正平]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "正平 (日本)|正平" to "Shōhei"

[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[天皇]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[北宋]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）

[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代皇帝（* [[939]] ）

== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ） == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ） == See Also ==

revision.text:
[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ）

[[sn:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 3월 29일]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[zh:三月廿九]] [[en:draft:March 29 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}} the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[長寛]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1163]] [[May 4]] ） - [[応保]] より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]] 1st year/[[Shōhei]] 16th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1361]] 5月4日） - 北朝が[[Enbun]] より康安に改元 * [[Tenna]] 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1683]] [[April 25]] ） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[Genroku]] 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1696]] [[April 30]] ） - Tokugawa shogunateが、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|12=draft}} 3rd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1853]] [[May 6]] ） - [[太平天国の乱]] で[[洪秀全]] が[[南京市|南京]] に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1401]] [[May 12]] ） - [[称光天皇]] {{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}} 、101代[[Emperor of Japan]] （+ [[1428]] ） * Hōreki12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1762]] [[April 23]] ） - [[飯塚伊賀七]] 、[[発明家]] （+ [[1836]] ） * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1828]] [[May 12]] ） - [[平野国臣]] 、[[福岡藩]] 士（+ [[1864]] ）
== Deaths == * [[至道]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[997]] [[May 8]] ） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]] 、[[Song dynasty]] の2代Emperor（* [[939]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}} .

[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1163]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} to {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛}}. * {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安}} 1st year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 16th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1361]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文}} to {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安}}. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1683]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1696]] {{ill|April 30|ja|4月30日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日}}) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1401]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日}}) – {{ill|Shōkō Tennō|ja|称光天皇}}, the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[1428]]). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1762]] {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七}}, an inventor (died [[1836]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1828]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日}}) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[997]] {{ill|May 8|ja|5月8日}}) – {{ill|Taizong of Song|ja|太宗}}, the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[939]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1163]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保}} to {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛}}. * {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安}} 1st year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平}} 16th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1361]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文}} to {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安}}. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1683]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日}}) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1696]] {{ill|April 30|ja|4月30日}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1853]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日}}) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[1401]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日}}) – {{ill|Shōkō Tennō|ja|称光天皇}}, the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[1428]]). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1762]] {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日}}) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七}}, an inventor (died [[1836]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} [[1828]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日}}) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} [[997]] {{ill|May 8|ja|5月8日}}) – {{ill|Taizong of Song|ja|太宗}}, the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[939]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] {{Lunisolar March}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1163]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保|12=draft}} to {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安|12=draft}} 1st year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1361]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文|12=draft}} to {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1683]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}}) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1696]] {{ill|April 30|ja|4月30日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1853]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日|12=draft}}) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1401]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shōkō Tennō|ja|称光天皇|12=draft}}, the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[1428]]). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1762]] {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|12=draft}}, an inventor (died [[1836]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1828]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|12=draft}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[997]] {{ill|May 8|ja|5月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Taizong of Song|ja|太宗|12=draft}}, the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[939]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1401]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shōkō Tennō|ja|称光天皇|12=draft}}, the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[1428]]). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1762]] {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|12=draft}}, an inventor (died [[1836]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1828]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|12=draft}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[1864]]).

== Events == * {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1163]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Ōhō|ja|応保|12=draft}} to {{ill|Chōkan|ja|長寛|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安|12=draft}} 1st year / {{ill|Shōhei|ja|正平|12=draft}} 16th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1361]] {{ill|May 4|ja|5月4日|12=draft}}) – The Northern Court changed its era name from {{ill|Enbun|ja|延文|12=draft}} to {{ill|Kōan|ja|康安|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1683]] {{ill|April 25|ja|4月25日|12=draft}}) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * {{ill|Genroku|ja|元禄|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1696]] {{ill|April 30|ja|4月30日|12=draft}}) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島|12=draft}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1853]] {{ill|May 6|ja|5月6日|12=draft}}) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1401]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shōkō Tennō|ja|称光天皇|12=draft}}, the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[1428]]). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1762]] {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|12=draft}}, an inventor (died [[1836]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1828]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|12=draft}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[997]] {{ill|May 8|ja|5月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Taizong of Song|ja|太宗|12=draft}}, the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[939]]).

Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senshō|ja|先勝|12=draft|12=draft}}.

== Births == * [[Ōei]] 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[1401]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Shōkō Tennō|ja|称光天皇|12=draft}}, the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[1428]]). * {{ill|Hōreki|ja|宝暦|12=draft}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1762]] {{ill|April 23|ja|4月23日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|12=draft}}, an inventor (died [[1836]]). * {{ill|Bunsei|ja|文政|12=draft|12=draft}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} [[1828]] {{ill|May 12|ja|5月12日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|12=draft}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} [[997]] {{ill|May 8|ja|5月8日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Taizong of Song|ja|太宗|12=draft}}, the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[939]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}
[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]] [[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:三月廿九]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦3月}} '''旧暦3月29日'''は[[3月 (旧暦)|旧暦3月]]の29日目である。年によっては3月の最終日となる。六曜は[[六曜#先勝|先勝]]である。
== できごと == * [[長寛]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1163年]][[5月4日]]） - [[応保]]より長寛に[[改元]] * [[康安]]元年/[[正平 (日本)|正平]]16年（ユリウス暦[[1361年]]5月4日） - 北朝が[[延文]]より康安に改元 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[4月25日]]） - 「八百屋お七」が鈴ヶ森刑場で火炙りの極刑に * [[元禄]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1696年]][[4月30日]]） - 江戸幕府が、江戸市中のごみを利用した埋立てを許可。現在の[[永代島]] * [[咸豊]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1853年]][[5月6日]]） - [[太平天国の乱]]で[[洪秀全]]が[[南京市|南京]]に入城。天京と改称し大平天国の都とする
== 誕生日 == * [[応永]]8年（ユリウス暦[[1401年]][[5月12日]]） - [[称光天皇]]{{Sfn|伊藤|2008|p=59}}、101代[[天皇]]（+ [[1428年]]） * 宝暦12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1762年]][[4月23日]]） - [[飯塚伊賀七]]、[[発明家]]（+ [[1836年]]） * [[文政]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1828年]][[5月12日]]） - [[平野国臣]]、[[福岡藩]]士（+ [[1864年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[至道]]3年（ユリウス暦[[997年]][[5月8日]]） - [[太宗 (宋)|太宗]]、[[北宋]]の2代皇帝（* [[939年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:3 nguŏk 29 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:3月29日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 3월 29일]][[zh_min_nan:3 goe̍h 29 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:三月廿九]][[zh:三月廿九]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q838930]] Wikidata name: 29th day of the 3rd month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|March 29|qq=March 29}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1163|1163]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] to [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]]. * [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]] 1st year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 16th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1361|1361]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] to [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]]. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eidaijima|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 永代橋|1=Eitai Bridge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549876}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xianfeng|qq=|1=Xianfeng Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135843}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1401|1401]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Shōkō|Shōkō Tennō]], the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1428|1428]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1762|1762]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]]) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iizuka Iga-shichi|qq=|1=Igashichi Iizuka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11666171}}, an inventor (died [[:en:1836|1836]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirano Kunomi|qq=|1=Hirano Kuniomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483648}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1864|1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:997|997]] [[:en:May 8|May 8]]) – [[:en:Thái Tông|Taizong of Song]], the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:939|939]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329|qq=}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=三月廿九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 3월 29일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar March|qq=}} '''March 29''' is the 29th day of the month {{ill|March (Lunisolar)|ja|3月 (旧暦)|lt=March (Yayoi)|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/March (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 3rd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1163|1163]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] to [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]]. * [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]] 1st year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 16th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1361|1361]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] to [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]]. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eidaijima|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 永代橋|1=Eitai Bridge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549876}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xianfeng|qq=|1=Xianfeng Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135843}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1401|1401]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Shōkō|Shōkō Tennō]], the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1428|1428]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1762|1762]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]]) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iizuka Iga-shichi|qq=|1=Igashichi Iizuka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11666171}}, an inventor (died [[:en:1836|1836]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirano Kunomi|qq=|1=Hirano Kuniomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483648}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1864|1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:997|997]] [[:en:May 8|May 8]]) – [[:en:Thái Tông|Taizong of Song]], the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:939|939]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1163|1163]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] to [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]]. * [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]] 1st year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 16th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1361|1361]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] to [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]]. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eidaijima|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 永代橋|1=Eitai Bridge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549876}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xianfeng|qq=|1=Xianfeng Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135843}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1401|1401]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Shōkō|Shōkō Tennō]], the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1428|1428]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1762|1762]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]]) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iizuka Iga-shichi|qq=|1=Igashichi Iizuka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11666171}}, an inventor (died [[:en:1836|1836]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirano Kunomi|qq=|1=Hirano Kuniomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483648}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1864|1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:997|997]] [[:en:May 8|May 8]]) – [[:en:Thái Tông|Taizong of Song]], the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:939|939]]).

== Events == * [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1163|1163]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The era name was changed from [[:en:Ōhō|Ōhō]] to [[:en:Chōkan|Chōkan]]. * [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]] 1st year / [[:en:Zhengping|Shōhei]] 16th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1361|1361]] [[:en:May 4|May 4]]) – The Northern Court changed its era name from [[:en:Enbun|Enbun]] to [[:en:Kōan (Muromachi period)|Kōan]]. * {{ill|Tenna|ja|天名|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenna|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:April 25|April 25]]) – "Yaoya Oshichi" was executed by immolation at Suzukamori Prison. * [[:en:Genroku|Genroku]] 9th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1696|1696]] [[:en:April 30|April 30]]) – The Tokugawa shogunate permitted landfill of Edo city waste, which led to the creation of the island now known as {{ill|Eidaijima|ja|永代島|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eidaijima|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 永代橋|1=Eitai Bridge|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11549876}}. * {{ill|Xianfeng|ja|咸豊|ko|함풍|uk|Сяньфен|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xianfeng|1=Xianfeng Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135843}} 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1853|1853]] [[:en:May 6|May 6]]) – During the Taiping Rebellion, Hong Xiuquan entered Nanjing, renaming it Tianjing and establishing it as the capital of the Taiping Heavenly Kingdom.
== Births == * [[:en:Ōei|Ōei]] 8th year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1401|1401]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – [[:en:Emperor Shōkō|Shōkō Tennō]], the 101st Emperor of Japan (died [[:en:1428|1428]]). * [[:en:Hōreki|Hōreki]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1762|1762]] [[:en:April 23|April 23]]) – {{ill|Iizuka Iga-shichi|ja|飯塚伊賀七|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iizuka Iga-shichi|1=Igashichi Iizuka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11666171}}, an inventor (died [[:en:1836|1836]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunsei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1828|1828]] [[:en:May 12|May 12]]) – {{ill|Hirano Kunomi|ja|平野国臣|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirano Kunomi|1=Hirano Kuniomi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11483648}}, a retainer of the Fukuoka Domain (died [[:en:1864|1864]]).
== Deaths == * [[Shitō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:997|997]] [[:en:May 8|May 8]]) – [[:en:Thái Tông|Taizong of Song]], the 2nd Emperor of the Song dynasty (born [[:en:939|939]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|3|28|3|30|2|29|4|3|0329|qq=}}

If the month is {{Nihongo|Small|小|qq=}} then this is the last day of the month. Otherwise if the month is {{Nihongo|Big|大|qq=}} then it is the second last day.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|WD=Q96759839}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
